text: Here, surrounded by relic-like machines and thoughtful wall texts, I sense a bridge between the past and present—a museum of minds, language, and coded conversation. Everything feels suspended between curiosity and nostalgia. When I turn and glimpse the world dimly lit, a person in bright red close by, I am reminded of the subtle community formed by simply being in the same space, sharing questions, or even just silence. I feel a little small but connected—like a witness to both technology's history and humanity's ever-present search for meaning and togetherness.
